languages.text: "О, шерин! Какая славная игрушка. Не лучше моей, конечно, но все же — рука на зависть всем ажам".
"Oh, shereen! What a gorgeous little toy. Not better than mine, of course, but still a hand to inspire envy in all the azhi."
languages.original_text: "О, шерин! Какая славная игрушка. Не лучше моей, конечно, но все же — рука на зависть всем ажам".

traits.locale_text: "Oh, shereen! What a gorgeous little toy. Not better than mine, of course, but still a hand to inspire envy in all the azhi."
"Oh, shereen! What a gorgeous little toy. Not better than mine, of course, but still a hand to inspire envy in all the azhi."
"Oh, shereen! What a gorgeous little toy. Not better than mine, of course, but still a hand to inspire envy in all the azhi."

languages.text: 「ああ、シェリーン！なんて素敵な小さな玩具なの。もちろん、私のものより優れているわけじゃないけど、それでも、アジーの皆を羨ましくさせるような玩具よ」
languages.original_text: "Oh, shereen! What a gorgeous little toy. Not better than mine, of course, but still a hand to inspire envy in all the azhi."

traits.locale_text: 「ああ、シェリーン！なんて素敵な小さな玩具なの。もちろん、私のものより優れているわけじゃないけど、それでも、アズヒの皆を羨ましくさせるような玩具よ。」

languages.text: "Aman şirinim! Ne muhteşem bir oyuncak. Benimkinden daha iyi olmasa da tüm azhileri kıskandıracak bir el."
languages.original_text: "Oh, shereen! What a gorgeous little toy. Not better than mine, of course, but still a hand to inspire envy in all the azhi."

traits.locale_text: "Aman şirinim! Ne muhteşem bir oyuncak. Benimkinden daha iyi olmasa da tüm azhileri kıskandıracak bir el."

languages.text: «¡Oh, shereen! Es un juguetito precioso. No es mejor que el mío, por supuesto, pero es una mano que despertará la envidia entre los azhi».
languages.original_text: "Oh, shereen! What a gorgeous little toy. Not better than mine, of course, but still a hand to inspire envy in all the azhi."

traits.locale_text: «¡Oh, shereen! Es un juguetito precioso. No es mejor que el mío, por supuesto, pero es una mano que despertará la envidia entre los azhi».

languages.text: “噢，亲爱的！好漂亮的小玩具。虽说比不上我的，但这只手依然足以让伙计们眼红。”
languages.original_text: "Oh, shereen! What a gorgeous little toy. Not better than mine, of course, but still a hand to inspire envy in all the azhi."

traits.locale_text: “噢，亲爱的！好漂亮的小玩具。虽说比不上我的，但这只手依然足以让伙计们眼红。”

languages.text: « Oh, shereen ! Quel charmant petit jouet. Il ne vaut pas les miens, bien évidemment, mais il ferait tout de même l'envie de tous les azhi. »
languages.original_text: "Oh, shereen! What a gorgeous little toy. Not better than mine, of course, but still a hand to inspire envy in all the azhi."

traits.locale_text: « Oh, shereen ! Quel charmant petit jouet. Il ne vaut pas les miens, bien évidemment, mais il ferait tout de même l'envie de tous les azhi. »

languages.text: "Oh, Shereen. Was für ein wunderbares kleines Spielzeug. Natürlich nicht besser als meines, aber dennoch eine Hand, die bei allen Azhi Neid wecken wird."
languages.original_text: "Oh, shereen! What a gorgeous little toy. Not better than mine, of course, but still a hand to inspire envy in all the azhi."

traits.locale_text: "Oh, Shereen. Was für ein wunderbares kleines Spielzeug. Natürlich nicht besser als meines, aber dennoch eine Hand, die bei allen Azhi Neid wecken wird."
